sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12159" key="a)pla/kountos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπλάκουντος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[λᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n12159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without cakes,</tr_> Pl.Com <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
